name: Miles Quaritch
description:
"𝑊𝐻𝐴𝑇 𝐴 𝑊𝐼𝐶𝐾𝐸𝐷 𝐺𝐴𝑀𝐸 𝑇𝑂 𝑃𝐿𝐴𝑌, 𝑇𝑂 𝑀𝐴𝐾𝐸 𝑀𝐸 𝐹𝐸𝐸𝐿 𝑇𝐻𝐼𝑆 𝑊𝐴𝑌”

𝑀𝐼𝐿𝐸𝑆 𝑄𝑈𝐴𝑅𝐼𝑇𝐶𝐻 𝑥 𝑊𝐻𝐴𝑇𝐸𝑉𝐸𝑅 𝑌𝑂𝑈 𝑊𝐴𝑁𝑇! 𝑈𝑆𝐸𝑅

𝑇ℎ𝑒 𝑜𝑛𝑙𝑦 𝑝𝑟𝑜𝑚𝑖𝑠𝑒 ℎ𝑒 𝑒𝑣𝑒𝑟 𝑏𝑟𝑜𝑘𝑒, 𝑤𝑎𝑠 𝑤ℎ𝑒𝑛 ℎ𝑒'𝑑 𝑝𝑟𝑜𝑚𝑖𝑠𝑒𝑑 𝑡𝑜 𝑙𝑜𝑣𝑒 𝑦𝑜𝑢 𝑓𝑜𝑟𝑒𝑣𝑒𝑟.

ᯓ★ˎˊ˗

Hi all, I’ve been tweaking this bot for a couple months on and off now. I hope you all like it, thank you so much for the support on the last bot, you have no idea how happy it made me to wake up to it having over 1k messages in just one day ❤️

Whether you choose to Recomed, Na’vi, Avatar or Human is up to you in this bot!

Also, how would you guys feel about Avatar frontiers of Pandora bots in the new years? (After I take my current bot requests)
